stack.crypto: platform WebAuthn API (@simplewebauthn/browser) + RFC 9449 DPoP (oauth4webapi); no hand-rolled crypto
stack.auth: Solid-OIDC redirect-free re-auth: app-as-RP WebAuthn assertion + RFC 8693 token-exchange + DPoP
stack.modules: ESM client (.) + ESM/CJS pure protocol subexport (./protocol)
